journal_entry.reason: When service is delivered against a previously received customer deposit, the liability (unearned revenue) is extinguished and revenue is recognized. The deposit was recorded as Deferred income when cash was received; now that the performance obligation is satisfied, we convert that liability to revenue.

output_debit_classifier.reason: This transaction records the earning of revenue from a service that was previously paid for via customer deposit. When the deposit was received, it was recorded as a liability (Deferred income or Contract liabilities) because the service had not yet been performed. Now that the service has been delivered, the performance obligation under IFRS 15 is satisfied, and revenue can be recognized. The entry debits the liability account to reduce it by $100 and credits revenue to recognize the $100 of earned income. Total debits equal total credits at $100. No tax is mentioned in the transaction, so no tax lines are included.
